ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "psa_1" TEXT /* Primary product category (e.g., PET, TOY) */,
  "psa_2" TEXT /* Secondary product category (e.g., GEN, FAN) */,
  "article" INTEGER /* Article number of the product */,
  "web_description" TEXT /* Web description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Colour of the product */,
  "pack_qty" INTEGER /* Pack quantity of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the product */,
  "assembly" TEXT /* Assembly requirements for the product */,
  "washable" TEXT /* Washability of the product */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age range for the product (e.g., 18 Months +) */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "dq_score" REAL /* Data quality score assigned to the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the system */,
  "date_updated" TEXT /* Date the product information was last updated */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is available for sale */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x20x30 cm) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional tags for easy filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_psa_2 FOREIGN KEY ("psa_2") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_psa_1 FOREIGN KEY ("psa_1") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand FOREIGN KEY ("brand") REFERENCES brands ("brand_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., PET, TOY, GEN, FAN) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand (e.g., Wilko) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the warehouse */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse storing the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for automatic reordering */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., supplier, quality_control, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being quality controlled */,
  "qc_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality control check */,
  "qc_score" REAL /* Quality control score */,
  "qc_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the quality control check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being moved */,
  "from_warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse the product is moving from */,
  "to_warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse the product is moving to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being moved */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date of the movement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_movements_to_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_movements_from_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_movements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
